_doc: Stage 11 output contract for identity gating to consensus. Validated against runConsensusEngine() on 2026-03-17.

output_contract.fields: Final accepted scalar field map for the current run before post-consensus refinement.
output_contract.provenance: Per-field evidence chain including confirmations, approved domains, pass target, weighted majority, confidence, and citations.
output_contract.candidates: Per-field candidate clusters preserved for reducers and review tooling.
output_contract.newValuesProposed: List-derived values not yet present in curated known-value sets.
output_contract.agreementScore: Average best-vs-second cluster dominance across resolved fields.

acceptance_rules.strict: Approved domains >= configured minimum and weighted majority satisfied.
acceptance_rules.relaxed: Manufacturer plus another credible domain can pass for non-instrumented fields.
acceptance_rules.pass_targets: Normal fields default to 2, commonly-wrong or identity-strong fields default to 4, exempt seed fields use 0.

post_consensus_adjustments: Selection-policy reducers can rewrite scalar outputs from candidate sets.
List union reducers merge multi-value fields when enabled by field rules.
Core/deep gates can reject low-tier evidence for core facts.
Wired products force battery_hours to n/a when no battery value survives.
